commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `agentRuntime` metadata to model catalog choices, propagates it through `models.list`, documents it, regenerates Swift protocol support, and shows runtime suffixes in WebUI model labels.

PR surface: Source +112, Tests +256, Docs +12, Other +4. Total +384 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. current main can be source-verified not to expose or render runtime metadata, and PR-head proof shows the Gateway JSON and WebUI picker displaying the new runtime label.
